message:
fix(engine): obstruction_certificate — length-prefixed hashing and feasibility check for recommended actions

- FallbackAction::content_hash: length-prefix all variable-length fields
  (kind, target components, description) to prevent delimiter collisions;
  remove bare '|' and ',' separators that could collide with field content
- FallbackPlan::recommended_action: filter by feasibility — only return
  the recommended action if it is actually feasible, preventing callers
  from acting on an infeasible recommendation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
